summaryAm: ጃክ አስደናቂ የባቄላ ግንድ ሲያገኝ በጥንቃቄ እና በድፍረት የሚያድግበት ታሪክ።
moralAm: ድፍረት ከጥንቃቄ ጋር ሲመጣ ጥሩ ውጤት ያመጣል።

source.name: Public-domain classic or folktale
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: ጃክ ከእናቱ ጋር በትንሽ እርሻ ላይ ይኖር ነበር። እርሻቸው ትንሽ ቢሆንም በፍቅር እና በትጋት የተሞላ ነበር።
pages.textEn: Jack lived with his mother on a small farm.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Jack and his mother on a small warm farm, child-friendly storybook style.

pages.textAm: አንድ ቀን ጃክ ከገበያ መንገድ ላይ ብሩህ ባቄላዎችን አገኘ። ሰውዬው “እነዚህ በጥንቃቄ ካደጉ ድንቅ ይሆናሉ” አለው።
pages.textEn: Jack received bright beans on the market road.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Jack receiving shiny beans on a friendly market path.

pages.textAm: ጃክ ባቄላዎቹን በቤቱ አጠገብ ተከለ። እናቱ “በየቀኑ ውሃ ስጣቸው፣ ነገር ግን በጥንቃቄ ተመልከታቸው” አለችው።
pages.textEn: Jack planted the beans and promised to care for them.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Jack planting beans beside the farmhouse while his mother watches kindly.

pages.textAm: ጠዋት ሲነሳ ባቄላው እስከ ደመና ድረስ ያደገ ነበር። ጃክ ተገረመ፣ ግን መጀመሪያ እናቱን ጠየቀ።
pages.textEn: By morning, the beanstalk had grown to the clouds.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A huge beanstalk rising beside Jack's home into soft clouds.

pages.textAm: እናቱ “ብቻህን አትቸኩል፤ በጥንቃቄ ወጥተህ ቶሎ ተመለስ” አለችው። ጃክ እጁን በግንዱ ላይ አድርጎ በቀስታ መውጣት ጀመረ።
pages.textEn: His mother reminded him to climb carefully and return soon.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Jack carefully climbing the beanstalk while his mother waves from below.

pages.textAm: በደመናዎች መካከል ጃክ ሰፊ አትክልት አገኘ። በዚያ ትልቅ ገበሬ በዘር ቦርሳዎች መካከል ይሰራ ነበር።
pages.textEn: Above the clouds, Jack found a wide garden and a giant farmer.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Jack discovering a cloud garden with a gentle giant farmer.

pages.textAm: ገበሬው ትልቅ ቢሆንም ድምፁ ለስላሳ ነበር። “ዘር ሲካፈል ብዙ ቤቶች ይበራሉ” ብሎ ጃክን አስተማረው።
pages.textEn: The gentle giant farmer taught Jack that seeds are for sharing.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A gentle giant farmer showing Jack baskets of seeds in a cloud garden.

pages.textAm: ጃክ የወርቅ ዘር አልወሰደም፤ ፈቃድ ጠየቀ። ገበሬውም ትንሽ ቦርሳ ሰጠው፣ “ከመንደራችሁ ጋር አጋሩት” አለ።
pages.textEn: Jack asked permission, and the farmer gave him seeds to share.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Jack receiving a small seed bag from the gentle giant farmer.

pages.textAm: ጃክ በጥንቃቄ ወደ ታች ተመለሰ። እናቱ ሲያየው “በጥንቃቄ መመለስህ ከሁሉም በላይ ደስ አሰኘኝ” አለች።
pages.textEn: Jack climbed home safely and told his mother what he learned.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Jack safely returning down the beanstalk to his smiling mother.

pages.textAm: ጃክ ዘሮቹን ከመንደሩ ጋር አጋራ። ሰዎቹ በተራ አፈር አዘጋጁ፣ ውሃ አመጡ፣ ትንንሽ አትክልቶችንም ጀመሩ።
pages.textEn: Jack shared the seeds, and the village began planting together.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Jack and villagers planting many small gardens together in warm sunlight.

pages.textAm: በማግሥቱ መንደር ሰዎችን ጠሩ። አንዱ አፈር አዘጋጀ፣ ሌላው ውሃ አመጣ፣ ልጆችም ትንንሽ ጉድጓዶችን ቆፈሩ።
pages.textEn: The village prepared soil, water, and small holes for planting.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Jack, his mother, and villagers preparing garden soil and water together.

pages.textAm: ዘሮቹ ተተከሉ። ጃክ በየጠዋቱ ይመለከታቸው ነበር፣ ልጆቹም “ዛሬ ትንሽ በቅሏል!” ብለው በደስታ ይጠሩ ነበር።
pages.textEn: The seeds sprouted, and the children watched them grow each morning.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Children and Jack smiling at tiny green sprouts in village garden beds.

pages.textAm: በጊዜው ቅጠሎች ተስፋፉ፣ ፍሬዎችም በቅርንጫፎች ላይ ተንጠለጠሉ። ቤቶቹ በአዲስ ምግብ እና በምስጋና ተሞሉ።
pages.textEn: The plants grew fruit, and the village had food to share.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A thriving village garden with baskets of vegetables and grateful families.

pages.textAm: ጃክ ወደ ሰማይ የሚወጣውን ግንድ በፈገግታ ተመለከተ። ድፍረት ከጥንቃቄ ጋር፣ ስጦታም ከመጋራት ጋር ሲሆን ቤትን እንደሚያበራ ተማረ።
pages.textEn: Jack learned that courage, care, and sharing can brighten a home.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Jack smiling beside the beanstalk while village gardens glow in sunset light.
